title: Remaining Experiments Engine Convergence
objective: Converge remaining experiment evaluation logic onto reusable engine contracts without real lake, runtime, NAS, provider, trading, or Git remote write.
current_risks: Engine direction mapping currently reads only core definitions while calculator_registry can accept custom calculators
Stage3 experiment factors must remain explicit runner-local definitions and must not be silently promoted to core factor library
Real lake semantic validation remains out of scope without separate authorization
